Article Title: Status of Bhagat Singh, Sukhdev and Rajguru as martyrs not tied to 'official records': Govt informs Lok Sabha
Article Text: NEW DELHI: The govt on Tuesday told the Lok Sabha that revolutionary freedom fighters Bhagat Singh , Sukhdev and Rajguru — who were hanged to death by the then British regime on March 23, 1931 — have become martyrs for the cause of attaining Independence of India and that their martyrdom is a fact “not dependent on the presumed presence of absence of official records”.“Martyrdom of these freedom fighters and their invaluable contribution in India’s freedom struggle form an inalienable part of the discourse of our fight for freedom and is well known in our history....Their stature is far above any award or title or status accorded in this regard,” junior home minister Bandi Sanjay Kumar said in written reply to a question on whether the status of ‘martyr’ had been accorded to the three freedom fighters.Stating that their names “will always be written in golden words in the annals of history,” Kumar said the ‘Dictionary of Martyrs of India’s freedom struggle from 1857 to 1947’, published by ministry of culture, has recorded the names of all freedom gighters, including Bhagat Singh, Sukhdev and Rajguru. “The government of India’s position on this has remained unchanged since 1947,” he informed the House.A day ago, on the occasion of Shaheed Diwas, PM Narendra Modi had remembered the martyrdom of the three heroes and, in a post on X, said their ideals of justice, patriotism and fearless resistance continue to ignite the spirit of countless Indians. “Today, we bow in reverence to the brave sons of Bharat Mata, Bhagat Singh, Rajguru and Sukhdev. Their martyrdom for the nation remains etched in our collective memory,” he posted.
Article Summary: Bhagat singh, sukhdev and rajguru were hanged to death by the then british regime on march 23, 1931. “martyrdom of these freedom fighters and their invaluable contribution in india’s freedom struggle form an inalienable part of the discourse of our fight for freedom and is well known in our history,” junior home minister bandi sanjay kumar said.

Article Title: Justin Herbert And Madison Beer: Justin Herbert’s girlfriend Madison Beer’s intriguing reaction to the chiropractor clinic’s holiday post has fans laughing
Article Text:
Justin Herbert’s GF Madison Beer’s intriguing reaction to the chiropractor clinic’s holiday post has fans laughing (Getty)

Madison Beer’s viral comment turns a simple Easter post into a fan-favourite moment







Madison Beer is back in the spotlight, this time for a light social media moment. The singer, who has been linked with Justin Herbert , left fans amused with a short and unexpected comment on a chiropractor clinic’s holiday post.The moment came when Rowley Family Chiropractic, a clinic based in Indiana, posted a TikTok announcing it would be closed this Sunday for Easter. Two days later, Beer chimed in with her hilarious yet blunt response. What looked like a routine update quickly caught attention after Beer dropped a simple one-liner in the comments.On Tuesday, Beer reacted candidly to that Eastern post, “What am I supposed to do now?” under the clinic’s post.The line's randomness stood out instantly. It did not take long for fans to notice and react.This is not the first time the pop star has shown her funny side. Beer has often shown this side of her personality online. While she shares fun moments, she has also spoken about the pressure that comes with social media.During her appearance on “The Zach Sang Show” in 2023, she said, “Trust me, I’m not trying to scare my fans. But literally once a month, I have a full-blown breakdown about it, and I’m like, ‘I need to get off social media forever.’For the most part, my life is on a good path, though, and I’m really happy, so I don’t know if all this is going to be a part of it for much longer.”Her personal life has also stayed in focus. Beer and Los Angeles Chargers QB Justin Herbert first sparked dating rumors in August 2025 after they were spotted together in Los Angeles. At that time, Herbert downplayed the rumors and suggested they were just friends.However, their relationship became more public later in 2025 when they were seen together at multiple outings. Reports and public appearances since then have kept the buzz alive, with both continuing to support each other’s careers.Beer also spoke about her approach to relationships in an interview with “Cosmopolitan” She said, “I’m just a lover girl,” while discussing her personality in love.In the end, as the title says, it was a simple comment, but it landed well. Fans noticed it, shared it, and turned it into a moment worth talking about.
Article Summary: Madison beer’s viral comment turns a simple easter post into a fan-favourite moment. The singer left fans amused with a short and unexpected comment. Rowley family chiropractic, a clinic based in indiana, posted a tiktok announcing it would be closed this sunday for easter.

Article Title: “Nothing else matters”: A’ja Wilson candidly recounts meeting with her fashion role model Beyoncé at Formula 1 race
Article Text:
Beyoncé and A’ja Wilson. Image via: aja22wilson/ Instagram

A’ja Wilson candidly recounts meeting Beyoncé at a Formula 1 race



A’ja Wilson balances fashion spotlight with on-court dominance







A'ja Wilson still remembers her meeting with music icon Beyoncé. Ahead of another season with the Las Vegas Aces, Wilson recently had an exclusive chat with Vogue, where she explained her true feelings about meeting the pop icon at a Formula 1 race.A'ja Wilson has been in the news recently. She has been supportive of her boyfriend Bam Adebayo, who recently clinched a record-breaking 83-point game. On top of that, she is preparing for another WNBA season.A’ja Wilson has long admired figures who shape both style and culture, often pointing to Beyoncé and Ciara as major influences. That admiration turned into reality during the Formula 1 weekend, where she finally met the global icon.“Beyoncé is amazing. Now when I see her, I’m like, ‘Oh my God, I met that lady. Get out of the way, everybody.’ Nothing else matters," Wilson said.Wilson has steadily built her own identity in fashion. From tunnel outfits to major public appearances, she represents a shift in how WNBA players express themselves.Wilson is set to attend the Met Gala as part of the host committee, sharing the stage with Beyoncé, who will serve as a co-chair.While fashion plays a major role, Wilson keeps her focus rooted in performance. Her recent season added another chapter to her career, as she secured multiple honors and led her team to continued success.She also acknowledges the balance required to manage both worlds. “There’s plenty of times where I’ve told my stylist, ‘I ain’t doing this. I need to pour into this scouting report before I put on a pair of heels.’ ”At the same time, Wilson embraces what representation means. “People should understand how powerful it is to walk into a game in heels, crush it, and put those heels back on. That is so powerful. That is women and I love that for us.”Her influence also reaches into design and business. From contributing to team facilities to shaping her signature Nike line, Wilson continues to take an active role in every detail tied to her brand.In her chat with Vogue, the Las Vegas Aces star spoke about the growing impact of tunnel fashion. She admitted the added spotlight can feel demanding, especially when game prep comes first. "There’s plenty of times where I’ve told my stylist, ‘I ain’t doing this. I need to pour into this scouting report before I put on a pair of heels,'" Wilson said.She shared that stepping into an arena in heels, then delivering a strong performance has a different feeling altogether, "People should understand how powerful it is to walk into a game in heels, crush it, and put those heels back on. That is so powerful," she said.
Article Summary: A'ja wilson met beyoncé at a formula 1 race. The wnba star is preparing for another season with the las vegas aces. She also spoke about the growing impact of tunnel fashion. Wilson is set to attend the met gala as part of the host committee.

Article Title: Aditya Birla Group, TOI Group, Bolt Ventures & Blackstone acquire RCB for $1.78 billion
Article Text:
Virat Kohli with the IPL trophy. (AP Photo)

Mumbai:

Watch RCB’s big changes ahead of IPL: New rules, tribute & squad update RCB’s big changes ahead of IPL: New rules, tribute & squad update

File photo of Kumar Mangalam Birla of the Aditya Birla Group.

File photo of Satyan Gajwani of the Times of India group.

Virat Kohli led the Royal Challengers Bengaluru team before Rajat Patidar took over. (Photo Credit- X/RCB)





Aditya Birla Group, The Times of India Group, Bolt Ventures, and Blackstone have signed a definitive agreement to acquire 100% of the Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) franchise that will include both the men and women’s teams.The Indian Premier League ( IPL ) and the Women’s Premier League (WPL) franchises are being acquired from United Spirits Limited (USL), a subsidiary of Diageo plc. The transaction has valued the franchise at US$1.78b (approx. INR 16,600 crore).The acquisition is subject to customary closing conditions, including the approval from BCCI, the IPL governing council and other authorities.The franchise, under its new ownership structure post the 2026 edition, will see Aryaman Vikram Birla, director at Aditya Birla Group serve as chairman while Satyan Gajwani of the Times of India Group will be the vice-chairman.“Over the past 2 decades, the IPL has morphed to become a global sporting powerhouse that has changed the face of Indian cricket creating enormous value for India. RCB, as one of the most compelling franchises in modern sport, offers the Aditya Birla Group a distinctive platform to extend its legacy of institution-building into the arena of global sport. We are delighted to become custodians of this asset and committed to further building this extraordinary legacy,” said Kumar Mangalam Birla , Chairman of the Aditya Birla Group.Times Internet Limited's Gajwani said in a media note, “RCB is the reigning champion and the most popular brand in the IPL. As The Times of India Group, together with our partners, we will build RCB into a global sporting institution, while remaining rooted in Bengaluru and Karnataka and its incredible fanbase. We are committed to the people who built this championship-winning culture - the players, coaches, the leadership team, and the fans. We look forward to supporting the team as they take the pitch on Saturday to defend RCB’s title.”Adar Poonawalla of the Serum Institute of India, Ranjan Pai of Manipal Hospitals, private equity firms EQT, TPG and Temasek and the Glazer family that owns the Manchester United club were among the other interested bidders when Diageo Plc had first initiated the process to sell RCB.In 2008, when the BCCI floated IPL, United Spirits had submitted a winning bid of US$111.6m (approx Rs 485 cr) to acquire the Bangalore franchise. In 2023, the RCB management had paid another Rs 901 crore to acquire the WPL team. In 2024, RCB won the WPL and followed it up with their first-ever IPL title win in 2025.The franchise has featured some of T20’s greatest icons including Virat Kohli , Chris Gayle, AB de Villiers, Shane Watson, Anil Kumble, Glenn Maxwell, Yuvraj Singh and Faf du Plessis among others.In 2013, after Kohli took over as captain of the IPL, the franchise’s popularity catapulted from being just one among the eight teams to becoming one of the most popular and sought-after properties in the tournament.Kohli’s rise as Team India captain and cricket’s most authoritative brand coincided with RCB’s rise as one of IPL’s most followed teams. Despite the lack of a title win in 17 years, the franchise acquired mass following among fans in Karnataka, across the country and social media.As of 2026, RCB remains right on top where its social media reach and general popularity across broadcast media is concerned.In 2025, Brand Finance had listed RCB as IPL’s second most valuable brand after Mumbai Indians and among the top three strongest IPL brands alongside Mumbai and Chennai. The same year, global investment bank Houlihan Lokey had also listed the RCB as IPL’s foremost brand.
Article Summary: Aditya birla group, the times of india group, bolt ventures, and blackstone have signed a definitive agreement to acquire 100% of the royal challengers bengaluru. The transaction has valued the franchise at us$1.78b (approx inr 16,600 crore) the acquisition is subject to customary closing conditions, including the approval from bcci, the ipl governing council and other authorities.

Article Title: Bcci Guidelines 2026: What IPL teams can and can't do in 2026 edition: BCCI's new guidelines
Article Text:
Image credit: BCCI/IPL

A list of do’s and dont’s

Watch Axar Patel questions Impact Player rule: ‘All-rounders lose value’ Axar Patel questions Impact Player rule: ‘All-rounders lose value’

Poll Do stricter rules improve fairness in tournaments? Yes, ensures better discipline No, limits team flexibility

Match-day rules include





The BCCI has barred IPL teams from holding practice sessions on match days in IPL 2026, according to a note sent to team managers. Teams will be allotted two nets in the practice area and one side wicket on the main square for range-hitting during practice. At Wankhede Stadium, if both teams train at the same time, each side will get two wickets.- No open nets will be allowed.- If one team ends practice early, the other cannot use its allotted wickets.- No fitness tests will be allowed on the main square on match days.- On practice days, players must travel to the stadium in the team bus, though teams may split into two batches.Players must travel separately from family members, while family and friends can come in separate vehicles and watch from the hospitality area.- Players are asked not to hit balls onto LED boards despite the provision of hitting nets.- Players and support staff cannot sit in front of LED boards. Designated seating for substitutes with towels and water bottles will be marked.- Players must wear orange and purple caps; if not, they should wear them for at least the first two overs so broadcasters can capture them.- Sleeveless jerseys and slippers are banned during post-match presentations. First violation will bring a warning; second will attract a financial penalty.
Article Summary: The bcci has barred ipl teams from holding practice sessions on match days in ipl 2026. Teams will be allotted two nets in the practice area and one side wicket on the main square for range-hitting during practice. At wankhede stadium, if both teams train at the same time, each side will get two wickets.

Article Title: Taylor Swift Wedding: “She feels overwhelmed”: Taylor Swift reportedly feels burdened as Travis Kelce steps back from wedding planning
Article Text:
Taylor Swift reportedly feels burdened as Travis Kelce steps back from wedding planning.(Image via Backgrid)

Taylor Swift might be feeling a bit uncomfortable as Travis Kelce makes her responsible for their wedding

When are Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce reportedly tying the knot after dating for over two years?





Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce , one of the world’s most popular and loved couples, are all set to spend millions on their lavish summer wedding in Rhode Island.While Taylor Swift seems to have taken a short break in her career to prep for her high profile wedding to Travis Kelce, it seems she might be a bit uncomfortable with a few things.As per reports, a source close to the high profile couple revealed that, “Travis handed off most of the planning to Taylor because she has a real vision of what she wants.”ID@undefinedCaption not available.The source added, “The downside of that is she’s getting very overwhelmed, to the point she’s having sleepless nights as a result.”To make matters worse, many details of their high profile wedding have been leaked to the media, just weeks before the billionaire pop star is set to walk down the aisle.This seems to have made Taylor Swift pretty anxious about her wedding to Travis Kelce.However, neither the billionaire pop star, Taylor Swift, nor her soon to be husband, the Kansas City Chiefs’ star player, Travis Kelce, has responded to the speculations concerning their wedding as they remain tight lipped.Interestingly, there have also been Article Title: Megan Thee Stallion News: Fact check: Did Megan Thee Stallion actually say she “feels lonely all the time” in her relationship with Klay Thompson amid cheating rumors?
Article Text:
Did Megan Thee Stallion actually say she “feels lonely all the time” in her relationship with Klay Thompson amid cheating rumors?(Image via Getty Images)

Has Megan Thee Stallion complained about feeling alone as she romances Klay Thompson?



Megan Thee Stallion opens up about dating Klay Thompson after a number of toxic relationships







Megan Thee Stallion, the six time Grammy winner, and the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson, seem to be pretty serious about their relationship as they continue to inspire billions around the world.While the two are public about their love for one another, their fans are panicking as rumors swirl about Megan Thee Stallion complaining about “being lonely” in her high profile relationship with Klay Thompson.No, the rumors are entirely false. Megan Thee Stallion has made no such claims about her relationship with the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson.In a clip that has sparked chaos among fans, it is being claimed that the six time Grammy winner, Megan Thee Stallion, allegedly spoke about how Klay Thompson’s busy career makes her feel “lonely” and has influenced her to cheat on him.However, the clip seems AI generated and has no connection to what Megan Thee Stallion has actually spoken about her relationship with the NBA star player, Klay Thompson.Neither Megan Thee Stallion nor the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson, has addressed the false rumor as they continue to be silent about the controversial clipAt this point in time, it seems Megan Thee Stallion has found her forever in the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson.A few days ago, in a heartfelt interview with PEOPLE, Megan Thee Stallion opened up about her romance with Klay Thompson, “Well, I don't never want to tell [anybody] to just jump in a relationship just because everybody else got one, and I'm not going to tell you to just jump in a relationship because you have to…”The “Something for the Hotties” artist added, “I didn't even know I was going to be in my relationship, to be honest.”While the two were pretty private about their romance initially, they went public with it as they walked hand in hand in public in July 2025.Ever since then, Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson have turned heads with their romance as engagement rumors continue to dominate headlinesHowever, Megan Thee Stallion has made it clear that they are not thinking about getting married any time soon as they focus on knowing each other more and falling in love deeply with each other.
Article Summary: Megan thee stallion, the six time grammy winner, and the dallas mavericks’ star player, klay thompson, seem to be pretty serious about their relationship. While the two are public about their love for one another, their fans are panicking as rumors swirl.

Article Title: Sir Gino: Unbeaten racehorse Sir Gino dies after infection as Nicky Henderson reveals Cheltenham injury and final moments
Article Text:
Unbeaten racehorse Sir Gino dies after infection as Nicky Henderson reveals Cheltenham injury and final moments (Image via Getty)

Nicky Henderson shares emotional message as Sir Gino dies after infection despite Cheltenham injury recovery





Sir Gino, one of the most loved racehorses in British racing, has died after a long and difficult fight with illness. Trainer Nicky Henderson shared the sad news on Tuesday, saying the six-year-old could not recover from a serious infection and had to be put to sleep at a veterinary hospital. The news has left fans, owners, and the racing world in shock, especially because Sir Gino was still young and had so much ahead of him.The horse had already gone through a lot this year. In January, during a run at Cheltenham, Sir Gino suffered a fractured pelvis. While he was slowly healing from that injury, he picked up another infection. This time, things became much worse. Even though he had beaten a similar issue last year and made a strong comeback, his body could not fight it again.Nicky Henderson spoke openly about the loss and how hard the past few weeks had been. In his message on X, he said, “We have very sadly lost the battle to overcome Sir Gino’s ailment and he has had to be put to sleep at the veterinary hospital this morning.” He explained that the infection had spread too far this time, even though the fractured pelvis was healing well.He also spoke about the horse’s nature, not just his talent.“He was not only brilliant but one of the nicest kindest horses you could ever wish to see,” Henderson wrote. He added that the loss has left a big emptiness at Seven Barrows and called it a very sad day for owners Joe and Marie Donnelly.Sir Gino’s record makes the loss even harder to take. He was unbeaten in all seven of his completed races. That included three Grade One wins over hurdles and an impressive Grade Two chase performance in his only run over fences. Henderson even said the horse was as good as any he had ever trained, calling him “unforgettable in every way.”Fans quickly reacted to the news, sharing their sadness online. One user wrote, “Truly heartbreaking. Sir Gino wasn’t just a champion on the track he was a once-in-a-generation spirit.” Another fan shared how lucky they felt to have seen him in person, while others sent support to Henderson and the owners.Sir Gino was more than just a winning horse. He had a strong connection with fans and those around him. That is why his loss feels so personal to many people in the sport.
Article Summary: Unbeaten racehorse sir gino dies after infection as nicky henderson reveals cheltenham injury and final moments. The six-year-old could not recover from a serious infection and had to be put to sleep at a veterinary hospital. The news has left fans, owners, and the racing world in shock.

Article Title: Roki Sasaki: Roki Sasaki contract with Dodgers: How much he earns and what’s included in his MLB deal
Article Text:
Roki Sasaki (Image Source: Getty)

Salary, signing bonus, and projected earnings of Roki Sasaki

Contract terms and long-term team control





In 2026, the contract signed by Japanese pitching sensation Roki Sasaki with the Los Angeles Dodgers is entering his second Major League Baseball season, which has attracted considerable media coverage in the baseball community. Although he is considered one of the most promising young pitchers in the world, Sasaki also signed a rather humble contract due to MLB's international signing rules. He had to sign under the international amateur bonus pool rules because he signed with the league before turning 25. Consequently, his present contract will be regarded as an extraordinary offer to the Dodgers against what he could have received in the free market.The financial deal of Sasaki is rather modest in contrast to the offers that are typically offered to star pitchers as they enter the big league baseball. He had been awarded a signing bonus of about $6.5 million when he signed with the Dodgers. This bonus accounted for the majority of his initial MLB wages and was structured under the international amateur bonus pool regulations that apply to younger overseas players.In the 2025 season, Sasaki earned approximately $760,000, the minimum salary in MLB. He has also had a reasonable salary increase for the 2026 season to $780,000, which is the league's standard minimum salary. His signing bonus plus end-of-season salaries have Sasaki projected to earn an annual average of approximately $8 million over his career through the conclusion of the 2026 season.Many analysts have widely observed that Sasaki would have commanded a huge bargain of over $200 million in the open market had he not moved to MLB at the age of 25. But his early action has enabled him to start his MLB career earlier, and this may have cost him a lot in his first income.Under his deal agreement as it stands, the Dodgers have the rights to Sasaki's contract for six full seasons, during which he remains under the company's control until the 2030 MLB season. The first three years of his career will be characterized by his earning close to the league minimum wage, in line with MLB's norms regarding the payment system for young players.Sasaki will be able to receive an arbitration on his salary beginning in 2028. The amount of his earnings may increase considerably at that point, based on his performance, awards, and statistical output. He will also gain rights to the MLB pre-arbitration bonus pool, which compensates the most promising players based on their awards or high statistical rates.With the 2026 season underway, Sasaki also finds himself in the Dodgers' incredibly qualified pitching rotation alongside others such as Shohei Ohtani and Yoshinobu Yamamoto, who are also international pitchers, further demonstrating the team's international pitching prowess.
Article Summary: Roki sasaki signed a contract with the los angeles dodgers in 2026. He had to sign under the international amateur bonus pool rules because he signed with the league before turning 25. He is projected to earn an annual average of approximately $8 million over his career through the conclusion of the 2026 season.

Article Title: Jayson Tatum: “Daddy’s injury made me sad”: Jayson Tatum’s son shares heartfelt letter that’s leaving fans in tears
Article Text:
Image - SLAM Magazine (#261)

SLAM Magazine

Deuce Tatum calls his dad a superhero and fans can’t hold back tears



"When Daddy first got injured, I felt sad,"

"I’d ask my dad what he was sad about and give him ideas on other things to do."

Jayson Tatum’s emotional road to recovery told by the one person who saw it all

"since you’re hurt, I can beat you now."

"I’m proud of my Dad. But I’m also so happy for my Dad that he’s winning games now that he’s playing, and that he can keep winning games so he can get ourselves to the Championship."

Jayson Tatum’s emotional road to recovery told by the one person who saw it all





In the world of professional sports, we often view superstars as invincible icons. But through the eyes of an eight-year-old, a superhero is someone who learns how to walk again just to play a game of driveway hoops. In the latest issue of(#261), Deuce Tatum, the NBA’s most famous son, penned (with a little help) a moving tribute to his father, Jayson Tatum, detailing the long road back from a devastating Achilles injury.The feature, titled "The Journey Back," gives fans a rare, domestic look at Jayson’s recovery. Deuce recalls the early days after surgery when his father was relegated to a scooter and crutches.Deuce writes.While the basketball world worried about the Celtics' championship window, Deuce was worried about his dad’s "scooter." He describes helping fold up his father’s walker and challenging him to shooting contests becauseIt’s a reminder that while Tatum is a five-time All-Star to the fans, to Deuce, he is simply a dad who needed a hug and some "Red Hot Riplets" (their favorite snack) to get through the day.In one of the most charming sections of the letter, Deuce rates his father’s toughness on a scale of 1 to 100. He gives Jayson a "79," explaining with childhood logic that while his dad isn't a professional bodybuilder, he is "really, really, really strong" for fighting through physical therapy. Deuce watched his father work with trainers daily, pushing through the pain of the "scar on his foot" with one goal in mind: getting back to the "us" mentality of the Boston Celtics.The viral quote that has captured the internet's heart serves as the emotional finale to the piece:As the Celtics push toward another deep playoff run in 2026, this letter has become a rallying cry for Boston. It frames the quest for another banner not just as a professional pursuit, but as a family mission. For Jayson Tatum, the "Power of Will" wasn't found in a gym, it was found in the little boy who carried his walker up the stairs, waiting for the day his "Big Daddy Superhero" could fly again.
Article Summary: Deuce tatum penned a moving tribute to his father, jayson tatum, detailing the long road back from a devastating achilles injury. Deuce recalls the early days after surgery when his father was relegated to a scooter and crutches. He rates his father’s toughness on a scale of 1 to 100.

Article Title: Frances Tiafoe: Frances Tiafoe vs Terence Atmane Miami Open clash takes twist as Logan Paul’s $16.5M Pokémon card sale called overpaid
Article Text:
Miami Open (Image Via Getty)

Frances Tiafoe vs Terence Atmane: Miami Open clash builds as Atmane questions Logan Paul’s record card sale





Frances Tiafoe is moving ahead with confidence at the 2026 Miami Open. The American player has already taken out defending champion Jakub Mensík in the Round of 32. Now, he is getting ready for his next match against France’s Terence Atmane on Tuesday. This match will decide who moves closer to the quarter-finals, and it is expected to be a tough one.But just before this big match, Atmane grabbed attention for something off the court. The 24-year-old spoke about the record-breaking Pokémon card sale involving Logan Paul. The rare Pikachu Illustrator card was sold earlier this year for $16.5 million to collector Peter Petipas. Speaking to Tennis Channel, Atmane gave a very honest opinion, saying the buyer paid way more than the card’s real value.Terence Atmane has been passionate about Pokémon cards for years. He started collecting them back in 2007, and even today, he still talks about them with excitement. So when he was asked about the famous sale, he did not hold back.“Overpaid by the buyer, that’s for sure. He bought it for 5.3 million in 2023, was already huge. The comparison between a PSA 9 and PSA 10 is usually two or three times the value, so I was hoping that in a PSA 9… I know a friend who bought it for 1.2 million.So for me, it was never going to go above 4 million, so 5.3 was already big…. And sixteen and a half million… honestly, great job, because now it’s the most valuable Pokémon card of all time, the biggest sale ever in every single TCG. It’s great that Logan Paul made history again, buying the most expensive and selling for the most,” Atmane said on Tennis Channel.While that debate continues off the court, his focus now shifts back to tennis. Atmane is set to face Frances Tiafoe, who is currently ranked World No. 20. The two have already met once this year at the Dallas Open. Atmane started strong in that match and won the first set 6-4. But Tiafoe quickly turned things around and won the next two sets 6-2, 6-2.This time, Atmane comes in with better momentum. He has already beaten strong players like Arthur Rinderknech and Felix Auger-Aliassime in Miami. That shows he is not here just to compete, but to push for a deep run.Tiafoe will still go in as the favorite. He has more experience and has handled pressure matches before. But Atmane has already shown he can surprise big names. That makes this clash more interesting than it looks on paper.
Article Summary: Frances tiafoe takes on terence atmane at the 2026 miami open on tuesday. The american has already taken out defending champion jakub mensík in the round of 32. This match will decide who moves closer to the quarter-finals, and it is expected to be a tough one. But just before this big match, the 24-year-old grabbed attention for something off the court.

Article Title: Scottie Scheffler: Why Scottie Scheffler left Houston Open 2026 at last moment as unexpected family situation unfolds
Article Text:
Scottie Scheffler (Image Via Getty)

Scottie Scheffler chooses family over golf as Houston Open 2026 sees multiple withdrawals





Scottie Scheffler will not play in the Texas Children’s Houston Open 2026, even though it was part of his plan before the Masters. The World No. 1 pulled out just before the event, and many first thought it could be an injury. But that is not the case. According to Golf Channel, the reason is personal. Scheffler is at home with his wife, Meredith Scheffler, as they wait for the birth of their second child.This event, played at Memorial Park Golf Course in Texas, is very close to where Scheffler lives. It was meant to help him prepare for the Masters. While other players like Rory McIlroy chose to skip it, Scheffler had decided to play. Still, when family called, he stepped away without hesitation.That decision has now become the biggest talking point ahead of the $9.9 million PGA Tour event.Scottie Scheffler’s withdrawal changed the field quickly. Matt Kuchar now takes his place, and Justin Lower moves up as the first alternate. Scheffler is also not the only one to pull out. Players like Austin Smotherman, Cam Davis, Ryo Hisatsune, Michael Kim, Matt McCarty, and Bud Cauley have also withdrawn from the event.But Scheffler’s reason stands out. This is not about form or fitness. It is about family. Golf Channel confirmed that he and Meredith Scheffler are expecting their second child. Their first child, Bennett, was born in May 2024. Now, the family is ready to welcome another member.Scheffler has always been open about what matters most to him. He once said, “I’d much rather be a great father than I would be a great golfer. At the end of the day, that’s what’s more important to me.” That line explains his decision better than anything else.His journey in golf has always had Meredith by his side. They have known each other since their teenage years. Over time, that bond has helped him stay calm even during big moments. He has often shared that her support keeps him grounded and reminds him that results are not everything.There is also a pattern here. When Bennett was born in 2024, Scheffler went on to win the PGA Championship soon after. He also followed it with another win at the RBC Heritage. Moments like these have brought out the best in him before.Now, with the Masters just around the corner, missing this event may not hurt him much. Instead, it gives him time to be with his family during an important moment. Once that is done, he is expected to return fully focused and ready for Augusta.
Article Summary: Scottie scheffler will not play in the texas children’s houston open 2026. The world no. 1 pulled out just before the event, and many first thought it could be an injury. According to golf channel, the reason is personal. He and his wife meredith are expecting their second child.

Article Title: Maxx Crosby Trade Rumors: Dallas Cowboys nearly landed Maxx Crosby before deal collapsed at last second, per insider
Article Text:
maxx crosby trade details (Getty Images)

Why the Cowboys Maxx Crosby trade fell apart: Full story behind failed deal





In the high-stakes world of NFL trades, some deals change the league, and others become the stuff of "what-if" legends. This March, the Dallas Cowboys found themselves at the center of the latter. For weeks, the football world watched as Jerry Jones attempted to fill the massive defensive void left by Micah Parsons' departure to Green Bay. The target was clear: Raiders' All-Pro defensive end Maxx Crosby The rumors surrounding the picks are remarkably accurate. According to recent reports from ESPN’s Ryan McFadden, the Cowboys made three distinct offers during negotiations. Their final "best" offer was a heavy one: the 2026 first-round pick (No.12 overall) and a 2027 second-round pick. Initial offers reportedly even included defensive tackle Osa Odighizuwa as a "sweetener." For Jerry Jones, this was an "all-in" move. By putting the 12th overall selection on the table, the Cowboys were willing to sacrifice their highest draft capital in years to secure a 28-year-old game-changer who could redefine their defense overnight.Despite the strength of the Dallas offer, the Raiders held out for a "two-firsts" package.They tentatively found it with the Baltimore Ravens, who agreed to send their 2026 and 2027 first-rounders to Las Vegas. On March 6, it looked like Crosby was headed to the AFC North.However, the story took a stunning turn four days later. In a shock to the league, Crosby failed his physical in Baltimore. While his surgeon, the renowned Dr. Neal ElAttrache, maintained that Crosby was ahead of schedule following January meniscus surgery, the Ravens' medical staff flagged a "degenerative issue" in his knee. Concerned about his long-term durability at such a high price, Baltimore pulled the plug, and Crosby was sent back to the Raiders.As of late March 2026, Maxx Crosby remains a Raider, but the "bridge" is in a complicated place. Interestingly, the Cowboys' own team physician, Dr. Daniel Cooper, was one of the specialists consulted during the Ravens' evaluation. This insider knowledge likely explains why Dallas didn't immediately re-engage with a new offer once the trade collapsed.While Crosby has since taken to his podcast to affirm his commitment to being a "Raider for life," the reality is that his value has shifted. Teams are now wary of the "80 cents on the dollar" risk. For now, the No. 12 pick remains in Jerry Jones’s pocket, and the dream of seeing Crosby in a star-decked helmet remains deferred by a medical report.
Article Summary: The dallas cowboys tried to trade all-pro defensive end maxx crosby to the oakland raiders. According to reports, the cowboys made three distinct offers during negotiations. Their final "best" offer was a heavy one: the 2026 first-round pick (no.12 overall) and a 2027 second-rounder.

Article Title: Taylor Swift And Travis Kelce Wedding: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s cute moment before their rumored wedding has the internet spiraling
Article Text:
(Image via Backgrid)

Travis Kelce reacts to Taylor Swift ’s framed Arrowhead photo—and fans can’t get enough



Eras Tour





In the hallowed hallways of Arrowhead Stadium, history is usually measured in Super Bowl rings and legendary touchdowns. But this week, a new kind of "Hall of Fame" moment went viral, capturing the hearts of both the Chiefs Kingdom and Swifties worldwide. As Travis Kelce walked through the stadium to sign his historic contract extension, effectively committing his future to Kansas City through 2028, he encountered a familiar face on the wall.There, among the backlit photos of the stadium's greatest milestones, was a stunning shot of Taylor Swift from herstop at Arrowhead in July 2023. In a moment of pure, unscripted sweetness, Travis didn’t just pass by.He paused, offered a playful wave to the photo, and flashed that signature Kelce grin. It was a silent acknowledgment of the place where it all began: the stadium where a failed friendship bracelet transformed into the world’s most famous love story.For fans, the "Hallway Wave" was more than just a cute clip, it was a symbol of how Taylor has become part of Kansas City. The Chiefs organization officially framed her performance photo alongside team legends confirms what we’ve all suspected, she isn’t just a guest in the VIP suite, she’s family.This gesture served as the perfect prologue to the chapter they are about to write. The buzz is currently about the much awaited wedding. While Travis is busy securing the Chiefs' future, he and Taylor are reportedly deep in the "presidential-level" secrecy of planning their upcoming wedding.The couple, who got engaged in August 2025 in a flower-filled proposal in Travis’s own backyard, are reportedly eyeing June 13, 2026, for their big day. The date is a classic Taylor "Easter Egg," centering on her lucky number 13. Rumors suggest the ceremony will take place at her breathtaking Ocean House estate in Rhode Island, providing a private coastal sanctuary for what many are calling the "wedding of the century. "As Travis prepares for his 14th NFL season, it's clear his greatest motivation isn't just another trophy, it's the woman in the photo in the hallway. From a chance encounter at Arrowhead to the final countdown to their wedding day, Travis and Taylor are proving that the best stories are the ones you never see coming.
Article Summary: Travis kelce gave a playful wave to a photo of taylor swift at arrowhead stadium. The chiefs signed kelce to a long-term contract extension this week. The couple are reportedly planning their wedding for june 13, 2026. The date is a classic taylor "easter egg," centering on her lucky number 13.

Article Title: Connor Mcdavid: Connor McDavid shares how he is managing health issues to avoid joining the Edmonton Oilers injury list
Article Text:
Connor McDavid has been dealing with hip and groin issues and is managing his workload carefully to avoid any further injuries (Image via Getty Images)

Connor McDavid taking no chances with his health as the Oilers try to avoid another injury blow





As the NHL playoffs are around the corner, the Edmonton Oilers have entered a critical phase where they have to remain cautious about their players so they don't get affected by any further injuries. Owing to this situation, Oilers star Connor McDavid is reportedly taking a cautious approach with his recent physical issues with the team to navigate this critical stretch of the 2025-26 NHL season.According to recent reports, the Oilers captain has been dealing with hip and groin issues and is managing his workload carefully to avoid aggravating the injury and missing significant time. McDavid's cautious approach comes at a difficult moment for the Edmonton Oilers, especially after his fellow team member Leon Draisaitl suffered an unexpected lower-body injury, keeping him away from the club for the remainder of the season.His absence has already put pressure on the team, making McDavid's health even more important as the playoffs approach. Edmonton Oilers star Connor McDavid is busy managing his health, as the team has entered a crucial stretch of the season, and they cannot afford to miss another star player to injury in their lineup.According to reports, McDavid left a recent practice early, which raised serious concerns. However, the forward later addressed it with a simple update about his condition.He stated, “Just hips & groin stuff. Yup, all good.” Though the issue is not serious, the team remains cautious, trying to avoid another injury blow to their lineup.Meanwhile, taking cognizance of the situation, head coach Kris Knoblauch explained the decision around McDavid’s health situation, “He was on the line of taking a maintenance day. Just wanted to touch the ice (today),” the coach stated. This confirmed that the Oilers are exercising a very cautious approach, especially with the season nearing its final stage.The Oilers are anyway dealing with a major blow ahead of the NHL playoffs, as star forward Leon Draisaitl will remain absent for the remainder of the 2025-26 regular season due to his serious lower-body injury. The player sustained the injury during Edmonton’s 3–1 victory over the Nashville Predators.As for the current NHL playoff scenario, the Edmonton Oilers sit in third place in the Pacific Division of the Western Conference, with 34 wins and 28 losses in 71 games played, trailing the Anaheim Ducks and the Vegas Golden Knights, who are currently leading the points table.The Oilers will be next seen in action against the Utah Mammoth in a tightly contested playoff race, with McDavid expected to look after the offensive lineup of the team.
Article Summary: Connor mcdavid has been dealing with hip and groin issues. The edmonton oilers captain is managing his workload carefully to avoid aggravating the injury and missing significant time. Mcdavid's cautious approach comes at a difficult moment for the edmonton oilers, especially after his fellow team member leon draisaitl suffered an unexpected lower-body injury.

Article Title: Carlos Alcaraz: Carlos Alcaraz steps away for family break after Miami Open loss to Sebastian Korda ahead of clay season
Article Text:
Carlos Alcaraz (Image Via Getty)

Carlos Alcaraz explains Miami Open loss to Sebastian Korda and his plan to reset before clay season





Carlos Alcaraz had a tough night at the 2026 Miami Open, and it ended earlier than many expected. On March 22, the World No. 1 lost to Sebastian Korda in the third round. The match went 6-3, 5-7, 6-4 in Korda’s favor. It was a strong performance from the American, but for Alcaraz, it was another early exit in Miami, something fans did not see coming.After the match, Alcaraz did not hide how he felt. Instead of rushing back into training, he spoke openly about needing a small break. The Spaniard said he wants to go home, spend time with family and friends, and clear his mind before the busy clay season begins. His focus now is not just tennis, but also getting himself mentally fresh again.Speaking after the match, Carlos Alcaraz kept things honest and simple. He said, “Well, I don’t know. I don’t know. Probably I’m going to go back home, which I’m just looking forward to, stay chilling with my family, with my friends. A couple of days. I don’t know how much they, my team, are going to allow me to have rest and days off. And all of a sudden you just go back on track, go back on the court.”He made it clear that this short break matters to him. The clay season is very close, and it includes big tournaments like Monte Carlo, Barcelona, Madrid, Rome, and Roland Garros.Alcaraz wants to be ready, both in body and mind. He added, “The clay season is around the corner and I have really good tournaments that I’m excited about playing there. My mind right now is to take some days off, reset my mind, reset batteries and be ready and in a good state for the clay season. ”This is now the second straight year where Alcaraz has struggled in Miami. Last year, he lost in the second round to David Goffin, even after winning the first set. So this year’s result will feel even more disappointing for him.At the same time, Alcaraz gave full credit to Sebastian Korda for the win. He said, “Sebi was incredible today. He played a magnificent match. There were many tense moments that I wasn’t able to take advantage of, and I think he was better in those points. I’d say that was the key to the match. Congratulations to him. He deserves it.”With this result, Korda has now improved his record against Alcaraz to two wins and four losses. The American will next face Martin Landaluce in the fourth round as his Miami Open run continues.
Article Summary: Carlos alcaraz lost 6-3, 5-7, 6-4 to sebastian korda in the third round of the 2026 miami open. The spaniard said he wants to go home, spend time with family and friends, and clear his mind before the busy clay season begins. He will next face martin landaluce in the fourth round.

Article Title: Puka Nacua: Puka Nacua’s Los Angeles Rams linked to $61 million Buffalo Bills linebacker
Article Text:
Puka Nacua’s LA Rams linked to $61 million Buffalo Bills linebacker (Image via Getty: Los Angeles Rams logo and Buffalo Bills logo)

NFL Trade Rumors : Puka Nacua’s Los Angeles connected to Buffalo LB Matt Milano

Rams strengthen with Chiefs CBs Trent McDuffie and Jaylen Watson





CBS Sports’ Zachary Pereles pairs Buffalo Bills linebacker Matt Milano with 2026 draft prospect Anthony Hill Jr. for the Los Angeles Rams. The analyst notes Los Angeles may need wide receiver help beyond Davante Adams and Puka Nacua, but a versatile, impactful linebacker could never hurt.The Rams have Nate Landman but pairing Hill with Milano could take the linebacker corps to a different level al-together. It would also relieve a lot of stress off defensive coordinator Chris Shula’s shoulders. Now, let’s take a good look at the 31-year-old Bills linebacker and how he fits into the Rams picture.Milano was drafted by the then-Tyrod Taylor-led Buffalo in 2017 in the fifth round as the 163rd overall pick.He recorded 572 total tackles [372 solo], 14.0 sacks, five forced fumbles, 11 fumble recoveries, 39 passes defended, two defensive touchdowns, and 10 interceptions in 106 games over nine seasons playing for the Bills.The veteran LB has also had seven past injuries: grade 2 thigh hamstring strain, grade 2 chest pectoral strain, unspecified grade 1 abdomen muscle sprain/pull, grade 3 knee MCL tear, grade 1 leg tibial plateau fracture, grade 3 arm bicep tear, grade 1 inguinal groin pull, and grade 1 chest pectoral pull.According to Draft Sharks, the 31-year-old linebacker has a 49 percent chance of injury in 2026 and a 3.9 percent chance of injury per game.The one-time Pro Bowler is projected to miss 1.90 games in 2026, and his durability score [ability to produce despite relatively minor injuries] is 3.02 [5 is most durable]. He currently has no injuries. But his parent franchise has released him after nine long, committed seasons. Now, several analysts are picturing him in Los Angeles.SB Nation’s Danny Stone reports Milano’s best days are behind him, but he could have some juice left in the tank, and for that matter, he could be a veteran presence to help place Los Angeles over the top.Heavy Sports’ Josh Buckhalter reports the Rams struck gold with LBNate Landman in 2025 free agency, and this year they could repeat it with Buffalo LB. He could be the push Los Angeles needs to land a Super Bowl win.Rams Wire’s Oliver G. reports Los Angeles fixed its secondary by acquiring Kansas City Chiefs cornerbacks Trent McDuffie and Jaylen Watson, and by keeping safety Kamren Curl. They also re-signed another crucial safety: Quentin Lake.This has led several analysts to shift their focus to the offensive side of the ball in draft projections for the Rams. So that means the defensive side of the ball, that is, the linebacker position, could be filled by a veteran. That’s where Milano fits the picture for Los Angeles.Anyhow, Milano will turn 32 this July. He recorded 67 tackles, 3.5 sacks, and one forced fumble in 2025. According to Spotrac’s calculated market value, the Boston College alum is projected to sign a one-year, $4.59M contract, giving him a $4.6M average annual income. His total career earnings over nine years are $61M.Heavy Sports’ Josh Buckhalter reports the Rams have the cap space, and they are known for bargain hunting at off-ball linebacker. Something that led them to Landman. And something that could lead them to Milano. Would Puka Nacua’s Rams sign him? Only time will tell…
Article Summary: Puka nacua’s la rams linked to $61 million buffalo bills linebacker matt milano. Milano was drafted by the then-tyrod taylor-led buffalo in 2017 in the fifth round as the 163rd overall pick. He recorded 572 total tackles [372 solo], 14.0 sacks, five forced fumbles, 11 fumble recoveries, 39 passes defended, two defensive touchdowns, and 10 interceptions.

Article Title: Bo Bichette: Bo Bichette steps into big Mets role as team moves on from Pete Alonso with new plan
Article Text:
Bo Bichette (Image Via Getty)

Marc Luino explains why Bo Bichette could fit better than Pete Alonso alongside Juan Soto and Francisco Lindor





The New York Mets are heading into the 2026 season with a very different team. After falling short in recent playoff runs, they made big changes. Pete Alonso and Edwin Diaz are no longer part of the roster. In their place, the team has brought in names like Bo Bichette, Juan Soto, Francisco Lindor, Luis Robert Jr., Marcus Semien, and Freddy Peralta. It is a fresh start, and a lot of attention is now on how this new lineup will perform.One big talking point is Bo Bichette taking over the cleanup role that Pete Alonso once held. On paper, Bichette is not known for the same home run power. But some believe he could still make a bigger impact in a different way.That idea was explained in detail by Mets analyst Marc Luino, who shared his thoughts on the Mets’d Up podcast.Speaking on the Mets’d Up podcast, Marc Luino pointed out that Bo Bichette could benefit a lot from hitting behind players like Juan Soto and Francisco Lindor. He said, “With Juan Soto getting on base as much as he does, alone, Bo Bichette would drive in 100 runs if he was healthy.”He continued, “With Francisco [Lindor] and Juan Soto getting on base as much as they do, we would be looking at [a lot of runs].”His point was simple. With two strong hitters getting on base often, Bichette will have more chances to bring them home.Last season with the Toronto Blue Jays, Bichette had 94 RBIs in 139 games. Injuries have slowed him down in recent years, but when he is fit, he is known for making steady contact and getting hits.Luino also explained the key difference between Bichette and Pete Alonso. He said, “We know Bichette, one of the big differences between him and Pete Alonso because this is relatively his spot, is that [Bichette] is going to put the ball in play a ton. He is going to get more hits.”He added that the Mets struggled last year when runners were on base but not scoring. “One of the biggest issues last year, not Pete Alonso’s fault, was driving in runners in scoring position … and having Soto and Lindor … it’s a match made in heaven.”While this debate continues, the Mets have also made another important move. Rookie Carson Benge has been named the starting right fielder for the 2026 season. He replaces Mike Tauchman, who is currently injured.Benge was the 19th overall pick in the 2024 MLB Draft. Last season, he moved quickly through the minor leagues, going from Single A to Triple A. He finished with a .281 batting average, .385 on base percentage, .472 slugging, along with 15 home runs and 73 RBIs. Now, with a new lineup and young talent stepping in, the Mets are clearly trying a different approach this season.
Article Summary: The new york mets are making big changes for the 2026 season. Pete alonso and edwin diaz are no longer part of the roster. The team has brought in names like bo bichette, juan soto, francisco lindor, and freddy peralta.

Article Title: Iga Swiatek: Iga Swiatek coaching rumors take twist as Piotr Wozniacki rejects role and backs Dawid Celt instead
Article Text:
Iga Swiatek (Image Via Getty)

Caroline Wozniacki’s father Piotr Wozniacki denies Iga Swiatek coaching role and suggests Dawid Celt





Iga Swiatek’s coaching situation has quickly become one of the biggest talking points in tennis. On March 23, 2026, the former World No. 1 confirmed that she had ended her partnership with Wim Fissette after a run of disappointing results. The news surprised many fans, especially because the pair had earlier found strong success together on the tour.Soon after the split, rumors started spreading that Piotr Wozniacki, father of former World No. 1 Caroline Wozniacki, could step in as Swiatek’s next coach. The talk picked up fast across tennis circles. But now, Piotr himself has come forward and made his position very clear, putting an end to all the speculation.Speaking to Interia Sport, Piotr Wozniacki directly addressed the rumors and left no room for confusion. He said, “I definitely won’t be Iga Świątek’s new coach. Someone passed this by. No one talked to me. And even if they did, I’d finished my coaching career.”He also shared why he does not want to return to coaching, even though he has received offers in the past. Piotr explained, “Honestly, after Karolina ended her career, I received very good offers, but now is not the right time.I have a wonderful family, grandchildren, granddaughters, and so on, and I know how much it costs. And I know how much energy, time, and true dedication it takes.”He added that his experience has taught him a lot, but he has already made his decision. “Of course, I also realize that people now want someone who is wiser about the mistakes they made, like I did with my daughter. And after all this experience, I know which direction to go, but that’s a done deal. Absolutely nothing can make me change my mind.”While ruling himself out, Piotr did offer a suggestion for Swiatek’s team. In the same interview with Interia Sport, he said, “If Iga Swiatek’s team, or Iga herself, hasn’t yet made a decision regarding Wim Fissette’s successor, I’m speaking out and I know what I’m talking about. Dawid Celt should be considered.”Dawid Celt is well known in Polish tennis. He worked as a hitting partner for Agnieszka Radwanska during her career and is currently the captain of Poland’s Billie Jean King Cup team. His name now adds another option as Swiatek looks ahead after a sudden coaching change.
Article Summary: Caroline wozniacki’s father piotr denies iga swiatek coaching role. He suggests dawid celt should be considered for the role. Swiatek has ended her partnership with wim fissette after disappointing results.

Article Title: Jake Dennis: Jake Dennis had fiancee Lexi Grace Boosey by his side at Madrid E-Prix, couple shares their on and off-track moments
Article Text:
Jake Dennis' fiancee Lexi Grace Boosey has shared their candid moments from Madrid. (Image credit: Instagram)

Jake Dennis and Lexi Grace Boosey sum up Madrid trip

Jake Dennis on his contract extension with Andretti







Jake Dennis has opened up about his trip to Spain and how he managed to secure points after finishing sixth at the Madrid E-Prix. His fiancee, Lexi Grace Boosey, also accompanied him to Madrid and shared some candid glimpses from their visit. The couple have another connection with Spain, where they have been working on their new home in Marbella. Boosey has provided several updates on the interior work in recent weeks and hinted that they may be moving in soon.Jake Dennis recently signed a multi-year extension with Andretti, having been part of the team since his Formula E debut. He returned to the track following the announcement and finished sixth at the Circuito del Jarama.He took to Instagram to share a few pictures from the Round 6 race and wrote: “6th in Madrid. A messy weekend with a mix of all conditions, but we came away with some points. Not where we want to be as a team just yet, so some homework to do! Overall, what a great event it was for FE’s first time at Jarama. Awesome track and a fully sold-out event!”Sharing more pictures from off the track, his fiancee Lexi Grace Boosey captioned her post: “Madrid momento.”A few days earlier, she had shared several pictures of their new house in Spain and hinted at their move. “2.5 years down. 2 weeks to go,” she wrote in the caption.Jake Dennis began Season 12 with a win in Sao Paulo and later proposed to Boosey in December. He is currently eighth in the championship with 47 points.Speaking about his contract extension with Andretti during media day in Madrid, Dennis said, “Honestly, it was a pretty easy decision in the end. We had multiple options on the table, but from our side it was always Andretti. That was the priority, and we managed to come to an agreement on a multi-year deal, so everything is aligned with our future goals.”He added in an interview with Formulae.com, “It’s obvious we want to try and get back to the top. I’m excited to continue in Formula E as well. The GEN4 car sounds very promising and exciting, and the championship is moving to new levels with a longer calendar and more exciting locations. I think Formula E is in a great place right now. I’m happy to continue racing with Andretti.”He will return to action in Germany next month, with the Berlin E-Prix double-header scheduled from May 1-3.Also read: Andretti’s Jake Dennis and fiancee Lexi Grace Boosey share glimpses of their Marbella home under construction
Article Summary: Dennis finished sixth at the circuito del jarama in madrid. His fiancee, lexi grace boosey, also accompanied him to the race. The couple have been working on their new home in marbella. Dennis recently signed a multi-year extension with andretti.
